violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Observed a towel not being stored in solution.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Deli meats in refrigerator were not properly labeled or date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Stand up freezer needs defrosting. Frost is covering food containers.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Food boats stored on floor in storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need to be cleaned more frequent.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items . Fly spray stored with food items.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
